data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $2.7041 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 12th, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of SOL spot ETFs was $2.7041 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net inflow of $2.0523 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $681 million. The second largest was the Grayscale Solana Trust (GSOL), with a net inflow of $340,800, bringing its total historical net inflow to $108 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs was $656 million, with an SOL net asset value ratio of 1.50%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $874 million.

data.title: Indiana Senate committee advances bill allowing state retirement funds to invest in cryptocurrencies
data.description: Cointelegraph reported on the X platform that the Indiana Senate committee is advancing HB1042, which would allow state retirement funds to invest in cryptocurrencies.

data.title: A major whale deposited 8,200 BTC, equivalent to approximately $559 million, into Binance in the past two days.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale deposited 8,200 BTC (approximately $559 million) into Binance over the past two days. The analyst stated that the price drops every time he deposits BTC; yesterday, shortly after his deposit, BTC fell by more than 3%.

data.title: Ondo Finance announced the launch of a tokenized US stock DeFi application powered by Chainlink.
data.description: Ondo Finance announced on the X platform that its tokenized equity DeFi application, powered by Chainlink as the official data oracle, is now live. Institutional-grade priced assets such as QQQon and TSLAon have been used as high-quality collateral to unlock on-chain equity. Leveraging TradFi liquidity and oracle data, Ondo's tokenized US equity now supports on-chain lending and structured products. The first project to launch is Euler Finance Vault, with risk management by Sentora and security provided by Chainlink. This marks the first time tokenized equity has been used as collateral in Ethereum DeFi.

data.title: Bank of Japan Official Highlights Need for Careful Data Analysis
data.description: Naoki Tamura, a member of the Bank of Japan's Policy Board, emphasized the importance of meticulously examining various data to determine whether Japan can smoothly achieve its price targets. According to Jin10, Tamura's remarks underscore the central bank's cautious approach amid ongoing economic uncertainties. The Bank of Japan continues to navigate complex economic conditions as it seeks to maintain stability and meet its inflation goals.

data.title: DayOne Data Centers Plans $5 Billion US IPO
data.description: DayOne Data Centers is preparing for a US initial public offering (IPO) that could generate approximately $5 billion, according to sources familiar with the situation. Bloomberg posted on X, revealing that the company has enlisted banks to assist in organizing the IPO. The move comes as DayOne seeks to expand its operations and capitalize on growing demand in the data center industry. The IPO is expected to attract significant interest from investors, given the company's position in the market and the increasing reliance on data centers for digital infrastructure. Further details about the timing and specifics of the IPO have not been disclosed.

data.title: Perp DEX Extended to Launch Stock Perpetual Contracts
data.description:
Perp DEX Extended, developed by a former Revolut team, has announced the introduction of perpetual contract trading pairs for six stocks. According to BlockBeats, these include Alphabet, Nvidia, AMD, Tesla, Strategy, and Amazon.

Extended highlighted that the primary challenge preventing the large-scale implementation of stock perpetual contracts on-chain is insufficient liquidity. The platform is actively working to address this issue and plans to introduce further updates in the future.

data.title: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte Faces New Impeachment Complaints
data.description: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte is confronting three new impeachment complaints, intensifying the political scrutiny surrounding her potential ascent to the presidency. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing challenges Duterte faces as she navigates the political landscape. These complaints could significantly impact her political trajectory and influence her future ambitions in the country's leadership. The situation underscores the ongoing political dynamics in the Philippines as Duterte's role and actions continue to be closely examined.

data.title: Twitter Sharing via Quark App
data.description: Crypto KOL @roger73005305 posted on X. Users can share content on Twitter using the Quark app. By clicking the provided link or copying the entire content, users can access the shared material through the Quark app. The extraction code is xhfX.

data.title: Hibachi Plans to Launch Stablecoin Forex Trading Platform on Arc
data.description:
Hibachi, a decentralized perpetual contract trading protocol, is set to introduce a stablecoin-settled forex trading platform on Arc. According to Foresight News, the platform will feature instant settlement as the default mode, offering tight bid-ask spreads, deep liquidity, and matching speed and system availability to meet traders' needs. Hibachi has secured backing from Circle Ventures' Arc Builders Fund.

Previously, Hibachi completed a $5 million seed funding round in March last year, with participation from Dragonfly, Electric Capital, and echo.

data.title: Hyperliquid Introduces Cross-Margin Feature on Testnet for Perpetual Contracts
data.description:
Hyperliquid has announced the activation of the cross-margin feature for its HIP-3 permissionless perpetual contract market on the testnet. According to ChainCatcher, this feature is not yet available on the mainnet but qualifies for the mainnet-level bug bounty program.

To utilize cross-margin trading, the deployer of HIP-3 must first enable it for a specific asset. Under a unified account, all cross-margin perpetual contracts using the same collateral asset can share margin, even across multiple decentralized exchanges (DEXs). However, assets on different DEXs are protected up to their maintenance margin levels to prevent automatic liquidation due to significant price fluctuations on other DEXs.

This innovative 'protective cross-margin' system ensures solvency without compromising user experience. The cross-margin feature is not designed for DEX abstract interfaces, and related interfaces should not allow cross-margin trading through DEX abstraction. Users are advised to use unified accounts or combined margins to achieve the expected behavior of HIP-3 asset cross-margin.

data.title: Trump administration officials signed a final reciprocal trade agreement that confirmed a 15% US tariff rate for imports from Taiwan, while committing Taiwan to a schedule for eliminating or lowering tariffs on nearly all US goods. More here

data.title: Bank of Russia May Delay Interest Rate Cut Amid Tax Concerns
data.description: The Bank of Russia is considering postponing a reduction in its key interest rate due to recent tax increases that could hinder the achievement of its inflation target. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential impact of these tax hikes on the central bank's monetary policy decisions. The decision to maintain the current interest rate comes as policymakers aim to balance economic growth with inflation control. The Bank of Russia's cautious approach reflects concerns over the potential inflationary pressures that could arise from the new tax measures. This development underscores the challenges faced by the central bank in navigating the complex economic landscape while striving to meet its inflation objectives.

data.title: Kaito to Unlock 58.11 Million Tokens on February 20
data.description: Kaito is set to unlock approximately 58.11 million tokens on February 20 at 12:00 PM UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the scheduled unlocks tracked by the Web3 asset data platform RootData. The tokens are valued at around $18.35 million.

data.title: Industry Leaders Gather for Insightful Discussion on Blockchain Innovations
data.description:
A recent event brought together prominent figures in the blockchain industry to discuss advancements and future directions. YZi Labs posted on X, highlighting the contributions of several key speakers. Among them were Ella Zhang, Head of YZi Labs; Zak Folkman, Co-founder of World Liberty Finance; Long Win SK, Founder of Hash Global; and Dave Lavalle, President of CoinDesk Markets. Other notable participants included Norris Lau, Head of Private Client Service at KGI Asia; Rica Dixuan Fu, Founder of BPN Network; Dingaling TS, Founder of Predict Dot Fun; No89thkey, Co-Founder of Brevis ZK; and Armaan Kalsi, Co-founder and CEO of Genius Terminal.

The event focused on the latest trends and innovations within the blockchain sector, offering insights into the challenges and opportunities faced by industry leaders. Discussions covered a range of topics, including the impact of blockchain technology on global finance, the role of decentralized networks, and strategies for fostering growth and collaboration among blockchain enterprises.

Participants shared their experiences and expertise, providing valuable perspectives on the evolving landscape of blockchain technology. The gathering served as a platform for exchanging ideas and exploring potential partnerships, underscoring the importance of collaboration in driving the industry forward.

Overall, the event highlighted the dynamic nature of the blockchain industry and the commitment of its leaders to advancing technological innovation and fostering a more interconnected global economy.

data.title: JPMorgan Advises Selling Two-Year US Treasuries Amid Growth Outlook
data.description: JPMorgan strategists have advised selling two-year US Treasuries, describing it as a tactical move. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the recommendation is based on a robust growth outlook, which could hinder the Federal Reserve's ability to significantly reduce interest rates. The strategists suggest that the current economic conditions may not support aggressive rate cuts, prompting this strategic financial advice.

data.title: North Korea Issues Warning Over Alleged Airspace Violation
data.description: North Korea has issued a stern warning to South Korea, stating that any further incidents of what it considers airspace violations will result in a severe response. Bloomberg posted on X that this warning follows a statement from a senior official in Seoul, who expressed regret over an alleged drone incursion by civilians into North Korean territory. The incident has heightened tensions between the two nations, with North Korea emphasizing the seriousness of the situation and its potential consequences. The warning underscores the fragile nature of relations on the Korean Peninsula, where military and diplomatic tensions have persisted for decades.

data.title: Solana-Based Platform Bullet Launches Perpetual Contract Trading
data.description:
Bullet, a comprehensive trading platform within the Solana ecosystem, has announced the launch of perpetual contract trading on its mainnet. According to ChainCatcher, the platform's underlying architecture is designed to handle up to 30,000 orders per second with latency as low as 1 millisecond.

Currently, Bullet has introduced a restricted-access mainnet, requiring users to obtain an access invitation code from team members to participate early. Users on the waiting list will gradually receive access permissions, with the first batch of users added to the whitelist today. Bullet offers a unified platform providing derivatives, spot, and lending products, delivering an integrated 'three-in-one' service.

data.title: U.S. Government Shutdown Probability Rises to 97% by February 14
data.description:
The likelihood of a U.S. government shutdown by February 14 has surged to 97%, according to data from the Polymarket website. According to Odaily, the trading volume related to this event has reached nearly $3 million.

In recent developments, the White House has been making last-minute efforts to prevent a shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security. They have submitted legislative text to the Democrats ahead of the funding deadline. However, it is anticipated that the Democrats will reject the proposal, describing previous offers as incomplete and insufficient.

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of "the US government shutting down again before February 14th" has risen to 97%.
data.description: Data from Polymarket shows that the probability of another U.S. government shutdown before February 14th has risen to 97%, with trading volume approaching $3 million. Previously, the White House intensified its efforts to avoid a Department of Homeland Security shutdown at the last minute, submitting legislative text to Democrats before the funding deadline. Democrats are expected to reject the proposal, calling previous proposals "neither complete nor sufficient."
